mapper.insert: insert into article(title, content, cover_img, state, category_id, create_user, create_time, update_time,location,bookNum,publisher,ISBN,isbnPhoto,tags) VALUES (#{title},#{content},#{coverImg},#{state},#{categoryId},#{createUser},#{createTime},#{updateTime},#{location},#{bookNum},#{publisher},#{isbn},#{isbnPhoto},#{tags})
mapper.update: update article set state=#{state} where bookNum=#{id}
